whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has been serving the Kearny community for years with safe, family-friendly flea treatments that deliver lasting results. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved products and advanced treatment methods to ensure complete flea elimination while protecting your pets and family.
localContext: Kearny's mix of historic multi-family homes near the Passaic River and newer residential developments creates diverse environments where fleas can thrive, especially in properties with pets. From apartments along Kearny Avenue to single-family homes near West Hudson Park, our team understands the unique pest control needs of Kearny's neighborhoods and waterfront properties.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Kearny, NJ?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Kearny typically costs between $350 and $650, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments begin working immediately, killing adult fleas within hours. However, complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as flea eggs hatch and are exposed to the treatment. We recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to ensure all life stages are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry. Your technician will provide specific safety instructions based on the products used.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation is essential for effective flea treatment. We recommend thoroughly vacuuming all carpets and furniture, washing pet bedding in hot water, and temporarily relocating pets during treatment. Our team will provide a complete preparation checklist when scheduling your appointment in Kearny.
